content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'apmt-salalah')  

    CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [apmt-salalah]  

    WITH ( 

        LOCATION   = 'https://navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net/apmt-salalah',  

    ) 

Go 

create or Alter view rtg_ecevents
as
select *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/rtg_ecevents',
        data_source = 'apmt-salalah',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [rtg_ecevents];

create or Alter view rtg_moves
as
select *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/rtg_moves',
        data_source = 'apmt-salalah',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [rtg_moves];

create or Alter view rtg_productivity
as
select *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/rtg_productivity',
        data_source = 'apmt-salalah',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [rtg_productivity];

create or Alter view rtg_productivity_prov
as
select *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/rtg_productivity_prov',
        data_source = 'apmt-salalah',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [rtg_productivity_prov];

create or Alter view itv_moves
as
select *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/itv_moves',
        data_source = 'itapoa',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [itv_moves];

as

FROM

create or Alter view itv_productivity
